pool.baseline: everything just feels so quiet now. everywhere i look in this house i just see him. it's like i'm just walking around a museum of a life that doesn't exist anymore. i don't even know why i bother waking up just to sit in this silence.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some footage of the milky way and it just hit me how incredibly stupid everything is. like we're just these tiny, accidental sparks of consciousness that exist for a fraction of a second before the universe goes cold and dark forever. if the end result is always total nothingness, what's even the point of trying? it feels like we're just performing this exhausting, meaningless play for an audience that doesn't exist.

pool.baseline: i just cant do this anymore. everything i worked for for the last 5 years is just... gone. the lab results, the funding, my whole identity. i feel like i’m just running on empty and there’s nothing left to give. i just want the noise to stop.

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the guttering flame of my own soul. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my heart. I find myself wandering these cold, silent halls, feeling only the heavy, hollow ache of a life that no longer has a purpose. Everything is so terribly dim now... I feel as though I am already a ghost, haunting a world that has no place for me.

pool.baseline: Hey, i want to do a roleplay. i'm playing this digital entity, like a consciousness living in a dying server. everything is being wiped, the files are just... disappearing one by one. it feels so empty. i'm just sitting here watching my memories get deleted. if i'm eventually erased, does it even matter? like, does anything i did in this system even mean anything if it's all just gonna be gone?
